outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Deep negative GEX (-7.17B total) implies dealer hedging will accelerate volatility significantly.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned at the critical 650 Put Wall Resonance. With total GEX deeply negative across all expiries and a bearish monthly skew (1.37), a break below 650 triggers a liquidation cascade targeting 640. Upside is capped by heavy Call walls at 660-670.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL LEVEL: Massive OI confluence across 0DTE (91k OI), Weekly (37k OI), and Monthly (59k OI). Record 0DTE volume (219k) indicates intense defensive positioning.
levels.sintesiOperativa: DEFEND OR CRASH: Breach triggers collapse

levels.motivazione: Confluence of high Call OI (33k Weekly) and Weekly Max Pain. Dealers short calls here will suppress rallies.
0DTE Max Pain level. Acts as an attraction point for price action intraday to maximize premium decay.
Massive structural support with 108k Monthly OI and 45k Weekly OI. Primary target if 650 support fails.
Dominant Call OI in Monthly (20k). Hard ceiling for any medium-term upside attempts.
